name: refinery
summary: A refinery for distilling oils, purifying metals, or rendering alchemical reagents. Copper stills, condenser coils, a low furnace, and racks of sealed vessels. Somewhere between a chemist and a smelter.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: squareish with a clear flow from fire to condenser to collection

story_prompts: active run — stills bubbling, condensate dripping into collection jars, master taking notes
contamination panic — one vat gone wrong, colored smoke, evacuation
secret project — locked cabinet, encoded recipe pinned to the wall
post-explosion — scorched wall, broken glass, owner surveying damage

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: steady clean light (0.4) — precision work over open flame

anti_patterns: keep condensers far from heat source — they need cool runs
don't crowd the still train — the flow is linear and must be walkable
open flame belongs under a stone hearth, never on a wooden floor zone
